update.foreach: update DO_OPERATOR_LOG set if_out_send = 1 where num_id=#{item.numId}

mapper.select: select NUM_ID as numId,OPERATE_TIME as operateTime,TERMINAL_ID as terminalId ,OPERATE_TYPE as operateType, OPERATE_RESULT as operateResult, ERROR_CODE as errorCode ,OPERATE_NAME as operateName, OPERATE_CONDITION as operateCondition,DISPLAY,DATA_LEVEL as dataLevel,CREATE_TIME as createTime, UPDATE_TIME as updateTime,IF_OUT_SEND as ifOutSend,USER_NAME as userName,USER_ID as userId,USER_CARD_ID as userCardId from DO_OPERATOR_LOG where IF_OUT_SEND = 0;

select ALARM_MODULE as alarmmodule, count(ALARM_MODULE) as alarmmoduleCount, ALARM_LEVEL as levelName, count(ALARM_LEVEL) as levelNameCount from do_alarm_msg
and ALARM_TIME > STR_TO_DATE(#{searchTime}, '%Y-%m-%d %H')
group by ALARM_MODULE, ALARM_LEVEL
mapper.insert: insert into DO_DATAGOVERNANCE_FOLLOW (DG_ID,DG_LINK,DG_DATANAME,DG_TABLENAME,DG_TABLEID,DG_MSG,DG_UPDATETIME, DG_SPONSOR,DG_SPONSOR_TIME,DG_MANAGER,DG_STATUS) VALUES (#{dataGFMsg.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataGFMsg.link,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataGFMsg.dataName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataGFMsg.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataGFMsg.tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataGFMsg.message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), #{dataGFMsg.sponsor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), #{dataGFMsg.manager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataGFMsg.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update DO_DATAGOVERNANCE_FOLLOW set DG_LINK = #{dataGFMsg.link,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DG_DATANAME = #{dataGFMsg.dataName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DG_TABLENAME = #{dataGFMsg.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DG_TABLEID = #{dataGFMsg.tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DG_MSG = #{dataGFMsg.message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DG_UPDATETIME = NOW(), DG_MANAGER = #{dataGFMsg.manager,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where upper(DG_ID) = upper(#{dataGFMsg.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select DG_CONCLUSION from DO_DATAGOVERNANCE_FOLLOW where DG_ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update:
update DO_DATAGOVERNANCE_FOLLOW set DG_UPDATETIME = NOW(), DG_CONCLUSION = #{conclusion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DG_STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DG_MANAGER_TIME = STR_TO_DATE(#{nowTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
DG_REVIEWER_TIME = STR_TO_DATE(#{nowTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
where upper(DG_ID) = upper(#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from do_alarm_msg where alarm_time < date(NOW()) - INTERVAL #{days} DAY
delete from DO_DATAGOVERNANCE_FOLLOW where DG_UPDATETIME < date(NOW()) - INTERVAL #{days} DAY
mapper.select: select THRESHOLD_VALUE from DGN_COMMON_SETTING where upper(PARENT_ID) = upper('alarmPush') and IS_ACTIVE = '1' and TREE_TYPE = '3'
